name: FinTech Magazine
signal: Infosys & Anthropic Partner to Deploy Agentic AI in Key Industries.
brief: This partnership signifies a major push for advanced AI integration in crucial sectors like manufacturing, telco, and finance. brief: Agentic AI is significantly speeding up the documentation-intensive drug development process in biopharma, promising shorter timelines for new treatments.
